title: tetracme quadricornis
intro: Tetracme quadricornis is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the four-horned tetracme. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Tetracme quadricornis include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Tetracme quadricornis can be made by infusing the leaves or roots in hot water, or by using the plant's extracts to create tinctures and ointments.
